title: The Dark Artifacts Catalogue [More Magic Series]
description: A great power for a great price
body:
# 📦 Installation
### Required
- Or-lib
- Spell Power Attributes
- More Spell Attributes
### Strongly Recommended
- Fallen Paladins and Priests
- Bards
- Druids
- Blood Mages
# 💎 Features
New and powerfull Trinkets that you can find in loot sacks in the most dark and dangerous, exclusivly created for the More Magic Series! 

Each trinket grant different spell school related bonus, and a strong malus too!


### Explore the most dangerous places!
In the most dangerous dungeons you can also find Forbidden sacks that when opened will give you an incredible powerfull belt or aglet!

# 🔧 Configuration
**Trinkets bonuses are fully configurable, here the path to the config files:**
- config/the_dark_artifacts_catalogue/trinkets

**And also loot chances are fully configurable, here the path to the config files:**

- config/the_dark_artifacts_catalogue/loot
